content.query:
SELECT 		'*EXE' [PRFL_Process Flag]
,			'100' [CONO_Company]
,			MT.WHLO [WHLO_Warehouse]
,			'WS' [E0PA_Partner]
,			'WMS' [E065_Message type]
,			OH.CUNO [CUNO_Customer number]
,			ITNO [ITNO_Item number]
,			WHSL [WHSL_Location]
,			'1' [QTYP_Quantity Picked]
,			RIDL [RIDL_Order line]
,			RIDI [RIDI_Order index]
,			'1' [PLSX_Picking list suffix]
,			BREF [BREF_Lot Reference 1]
FROM        M3.MITTRA MT 
JOIN       M3.OOHEAD OH ON MT.RIDN = OH.ORNO 
WHERE 		MT.RIDI IN('123879','126580','127333','130766','130768','127872','128727','128836','129104','129329','129342','129454','130009','130030','130132','130816')
AND MT.TTYP ='93'
